title: Between Dangers
writer: Walter J. Coburn (story "Ride 'Em Cowboy"), Richard Thorpe (scenario)
actors: Buddy Roosevelt, Alma Rayford, Rennie Young, Al Taylor
plot: Cowhand Tom Rawlins inherits a ranch but there are some double-crossing lawyers who are out to take it from him. It is up to him to prove his identity but the lawyers and their henchmen ...
